description.content: Operations related to user management

query.description: Maximum number of records to return. Must be between 1 and 100 inclusive.
Number of records to skip for pagination. Must be a non-negative integer.

Filter users by attribute values.
Supported operators: eq (ie. equals).
Format: `attribute operator "value"`.
Examples:
- `username eq "john.doe"` - Users with username = "john.doe"'
- `age eq 25` - Users with age = 25
- `address.city eq "Mountain View"` - Users with address.city = "Mountain View"

Optional parameter to include additional display information in the response. The exact fields included depend on the endpoint. See each endpoint's response schema for details on which fields are enriched.

item.name: List users in organization unit specified by handle path

request.name: List users in organization unit specified by handle path

query.description: Maximum number of records to return. Must be between 1 and 100 inclusive.
Number of records to skip for pagination. Must be a non-negative integer.

Filter users by attribute values.
Supported operators: eq (ie. equals).
Format: `attribute operator "value"`.
Examples:
- `username eq "john.doe"` - Users with username = "john.doe"'
- `age eq 25` - Users with age = 25
- `address.city eq "Mountain View"` - Users with address.city = "Mountain View"

Optional parameter to include additional display information in the response. The exact fields included depend on the endpoint. See each endpoint's response schema for details on which fields are enriched.

variable.description:
(Required) Hierarchical path of organization unit handles separated by forward slashes.
Examples:
- `engineering` - Lists users in the "engineering" OU
- `engineering/frontend` - Lists users in "engineering/frontend"
